CapGainsLossTxInvstIncmGrp.PropertyDesc: CENTER STREET LENDING - GAIN ON EXCESS DISTRIBUTION

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: PURCHASE OF A BUILDING TO BE USED BY PUBLIC CHARITIES TO CARRY OUT THEIR TAX-EXEMPT FUNCTIONS

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: LETTER WITH THE GRANT APPLICATION FORM.

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: TO BUILD HEALTHIER LIVES, FREE OF CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASES AND STROKE
TO EDUCATE US PERSONS TO INCREASE AWARENESS ABOUT A FREE ECONOMY
TO PROVIDE PAJAMAS AND BOOKS TO CHILDREN IN NEED
TO INSPIRE, ENGAGE, AND ENTERTAIN BY SHARING THE PASSION OF THE THEATRE
TO PROMOTE YOUTH GUIDANCE THROUGH EDUCATIONAL, VOCATIONAL, RECREATIONAL, SOCIAL, AND CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT
TO UNITE THE MONASTIC CHARISM WITH AN ORIENTATION TO THE EUCHARIST IN THE SERVICE OF THE CHURCH
TO PROVIDE HELP, CREATE HOPE, AND SERVE ALL BY STRENGTHENING CHILDREN, FAMILIES, ADULTS, AND COMMUNITIES.

TO EDUCATE, MOTIVATE, AND INVIGORATE STEWARDSHIP WITHIN THE DIOCESE OF TUCSON, TO GARNER RESOURCES IN A FISCALLY TRANSPARENT AND RESPONSIBLE MANNER, AND TO MANAGE AND DISTRIBUTED SOLICITED GIFTS FOR THE IMMEDIATE AND LONG TERM NEEDS OF THE FAITH COMMUNITY OF THE DIOCESE.
TO ASSIST THE POOR AND VULNERABLE OVERSEAS.
TO ENSURE THAT VULNERABLE MEMBERS OF OUR COMMUNITY ARE SHELTERED, FED, PROTECTED, EDUCATED, AND PROVIDED WITH A PROMISE OF OPPORTUNITY.
TO OFFER EXCITING EXHIBITS, INVENTIVE PROGRAMS AND FUN, FREE COMMUNITY EVENTS.
TO PROVIDE FREE LEGAL AND SOCIAL SERVICES TO DETAINED IMMIGRANTS IN ARIZONA
TO HELP LOCAL GIRL SCOUTS BUILD THECOURAGE, CONFIDENCE AND CHARACTER TO MAKE THE WORLD A BETTER PLACE
TO SERVE THE HOMELESS AND NEEDY BY PROVIDING FOR THEIR SPIRITUAL, PHYSICAL, EMOTIONAL, AND MENTAL WHOLENESS THROUGH THE POWER OF JESUS CHRIST.
TO GIVE ENTIRE COMMUNITIES THE SUSTAINABLE TOOLS THEY NEED TO FEED FAMILIES, EDUCATE CHILDREN, IMPROVE HEALTH AND BECOME ECONOMICALLY SELF-SUFFICIENT.
TO ASSIST IMPOVERISHED SINGLE MOM FAMILIES WHILE THE MOMS ARE PURSUING A COLLEGE EDUCATION AND FINANCIAL INDEPENDENCE.
TO HELP PEOPLE RECOVED FROM MANY DIFFERENT TYPES OF NEURO-MUSCULO-SKELETAL CONDITIONS
TO SUPPORT RETIRED PRIESTS AND SEMINARIAN EDUCATION FUNDS
TO HOST ANNUAL CHRISTMAS EVENT
TO EMPOWER YOUTH FACING TOUGH LIFE CHALLENGES TO REACH THEIR GOD GIVEN POTENTIAL AND BECOME TRANSFORMATIVE MEMBERS OF THEIR FAMILIES AND COMMUNITIES IN THENAME OF JESUS CHRIST.
TO PROVIDE PROGRAMS DESIGNED TO USE THE POWER OF AMATEUR FOOTBALL IN DEVELOPING SCHOLARSHIP, CITIZENSHIP AND ATHLETIC ACHIEVMENT IN YOUNG PEOPLE
TO OFFER HOUSING, COUNSELING AND SUPPORT SERVICES TO HELP HOMELESSNESS TRANSFORM THEIR LIVES.
TO OFFER THE VERY BEST MEDICAL SPECIALISTS, CUTTING-EDGE TECHNOLOGY, AND FAMILY-FRIENDLY SERVICES WITHOUT REGARD TO THE FAMILY'S ABILITY TO PAY.
TO PROVIDE DAILY LIFE-SUSTAINING SERVICES TO THE POOR, HUNGRY AND HOMELESS OF THE FRESNO COMMUNITY
TO HELP STUDENTS RECEIVE SCHOLARSHIPS
TO PROVIDE EXCELLENT K-8 CATHOLLIC EDUCATION

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: TO OFFER BOTH EMOTIONAL SUPPORT AND REAL SUPPORT FOR THE NEEDS WE ENCOUNTER. ST. VINCENT DE PAUL
TO HELP HOMELESS WOMEN
TO PROVIDE HIGH-QUALITY LEVELS OF SERVICE AND CARE FOR ITS ELDER COMMUNITY MEMBERS WHO ARE ALL OF LIMITED FINANCIAL MEANS.
TO PROMOTE EDUCATIONAL EXCELLENCE BY PROVIDING RESOURCES TO SUPPORT WORK WHICH ENRICHES THE EDUCATION, DEVELOPMENT, AND WELL BEING OF ALL SUNNYSIDE UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT CHILDREN
TO HONOR AND CHAMPION THE RELEVANCE TODAY OF THE LIFE AND LEADERSHIP OF DWIGHT D. EISENHOWER THROUGH COMPELLING PROGRAMS AND EVENTS THAT CELEBRATE HIS LEGACY.
TO PROVIDE GENDER-SPECIFIC SUBSTANCE USE SERVICES FOR WOMEN IN A SAFE, SUPPORTIVE ENVIRONMENT FREE OF JUDGMENT AND STIGMA.
TO CURE LEUKEMIA, LYMPHOMA, HODGKIN'S DISEASE AND MYELOMA, AND IMPROVE THE QUALITY OF LIFE OF PATIENTS AND THEIR FAMILIES.
TO MAINTAIN A SAFE, HOME-LIKE ATMOSPHERE WHILE PROVIDING CARE AND ASSISTANCE FOR THOSE WHO NEED EXTRA HELP.
TO PROVIDE PATHWAYS OUT OF POVERTY
TO PREACH THE GOSPEL OF JESUS CHRIST AND TO MEET HUMAN NEEDS IN HIS NAME WITHOUT DISCRIMINATION.
TO CREATE A COMMUNITY OF ACCEPTANCE AND UNDERSTANDING REGARDING CHILDREN IN GRIEF
TO ENHANCE STUDENT EXPERIENCE BY PROVIDING LEARNING OPPORTUNITIES TO HELP THEM SUCCEED
TO ADDRESS THE UNMET COMMUNITY NEEDS, INVEST IN UNDERSERVED AREAS AND PROVIDE OUTREACH AND COLLABORATIVE PROGRAMS TO BENEFIT THE HEALTH AND WELL-BEING OF SOUTHERN ARIZONANS.
TO HELP CHILDREN IN NEED

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: U OF A CHALLENGED ATHLETES FOUNDATION

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: IT IS THE MISSION OF THE CHALLENGED ATHLETES FOUNDATION (CAF) TO PROVIDE OPPORTUNITIES AND SUPPORT TO PEOPLE WITH PHYSICAL CHALLENGES, SO THEY CAN PURSUE ACTIVE LIFESTYLES THROUGH PHYSICAL FITNESS AND COMPETITIVE ATHLETICS.
TO FUNDRAISE FOR TUITION AND TRAVEL SCHOLARSHIPS FOR ARIZONAS YOUTH FOR MUSIC EDUCATION
TO SUPPORT DANON DISEASE RESEARCH FUND
TO SUPPORT HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATION AND CONTINUED SUCCEESS OF HOMELESS, UNACCOMPANIED YOUTH

OtherRevenueDescribedGrp.Desc: CENTER STREET LENDING MP IV, LLC

ContributorInformationGrp.ContributorPersonNm: HUMBERTO S AND CZARINA M LOPEZ

NonCashPropertyContributionGrp.NoncashPropertyDesc: 30% INTEREST IN PANTANO ESCALANTE ASSOCIATION LLC
STOCK WARRANT TO PURCHASE 6.4% OF CLASS A COMMON STOCK IN SINFONIA HEALTHCARE CORPORATION

ActyNotPreviouslyRptExpln.ExplanationTxt: THE FOUNDATION OWNS 100% OF HSL CENTER OF OPPORTUNITY LLC. HSL CENTER OF OPPORTUNITY LLC OWNS A A BUILDING THAT IT IS PROVIDING THE USE OF TO VARIOUS PUBLIC CHARITIES IN TUCSON, ARIZONA. THE FOUNDATION WILL NOT CHARGE THE CHARITIES ANY RENT. THE BUILDING IS CURRENTLY UNDERGOING RENOVATION TO ACCOMODATE THE VARIOUS PROGRAM SERVICES FOR THE CHARITIES.

OtherIncomeDetail.Desc: CENTER STREET LENDING MP IV, LLC

ReductionExplanationStatement.ShortExplanationTxt: THE VALUATION OF PANTANO/ESCALANTE ASSOCIATES WAS BASED ON A NON-CONTROLLING, NONMARKETABLE OWNERSHIP BASIS USING GENERALLY ACCEPTABLE METHODS FOR VALUATION PURPOSES BY A QUALIFIED APPRAISER. THE INVESTMENT IS CLOSELY HELD AND IS NOT READILY SOLD. THE APPRAISED VALUE USED AN EFFECTIVE DISCOUNT OF 35%. THE DISCOUNT IN THE AVERAGE MONTHLY FAIR MARKET VALUE WAS LIMITED TO 10% OF THE GROSS VALUE OF THE INVESTMENT.

TaxesDetail.CategoryTxt: REAL ESTATE TAXES - CENTER OF OPPORTUNITY
